B.text: It remains confined to a narrow column beneath the nozzle.

C.text: It spreads along the trench, away from the rocket.

D.text: t moves upward, away from the pad, without touching the trench.

parsed.answer_value: It spreads along the trench, away from the rocket.
parsed.rationale: The exhaust plume initially appears as a narrow column but quickly spreads along the trench, indicating a change in direction and dispersion right after ignition.
